name: command-center
description: Turn any firm into a Cowork-automated operation. Drop any mix of files into one shared inbox; the intake skill auto-detects each file's type, routes it to the right process (receipt filing, photo sorting, daily reports, invoicing), asks only the unavoidable questions, parks receipts flat in ONE output folder — never creating subfolders; unclear ones get a PRÜFEN- name prefix, no approval gate, payables without SEPA mandate land on a checkable Offene-Rechnungen list, and opens one interactive review board for everything else. Onboard the firm once — every process inherits the context. Invoicing supports an optional Montagebau/Service-Report preset (separate Montage-/Fahrt-Sätze, independent Sa/So-Zuschlag, per-vehicle Geräte-Abrechnung) for firms billing skilled-trade work from handwritten service reports.
